problem.value: Leave is approved inconsistently, with no systematic balance check or audit trail.
problem.evidence: Requested a "system", underlying pain inferred from as-is

current_process.value: Handled today via email and an Excel spreadsheet.

success_metrics.value: Fewer balance errors, full auditability, timely escalations, a successful pilot.

actors.value: Employee, Manager, HR, Administrator, and external client contacts.

business_objects.value: Existing Leave/Absence extended with approval status, approver chain, balance, delegation, escalation and a calendar reference.

business_rules.value: Balance/quota check before approval; manager then HR above a threshold; rules vary by client, country and contract.

workflow.value: submitted -> manager -> optional HR -> approved/rejected; auto-escalation after 5 business days; separate HR-validated cancellation, including started leave.

integrations.value: Email + in-app notifications on key events; one-way calendar sync (system to calendar).

permissions.value: Employee/Manager/HR/Admin; HR is the sole editor of approved requests and validator of cancellations; a delegation layer overlays existing permissions.

config_vs_custom.value: Approval circuit configurable per client; multi-tenant configuration isolation for a pilot-then-scale rollout.

constraints.value: French labour law (paid leave, RTT) and GDPR on HR data apply; delivery timeline not yet specified.

edge_cases.value: Overlapping requests allowed but revalidated at approval; cancellation of already-started leave; approver/delegate racing the escalation timer.

reporting.evidence: Not raised; low impact for this request

acceptance.value: Approve/reject scenarios across the circuit; concurrency and escalation timing not yet formalised.

risks.value: Shared approval framework may ripple into other modules; concurrency on balance; audit trail weakened by not migrating historical requests.

summary.objective: Replace the email/Excel-based leave approval process with a configurable, auditable digital workflow that enforces real-time balance checks, routes notifications by role, and scales safely via a pilot-first rollout.
summary.scope: Leave request lifecycle with balance validation, multi-level configurable circuit, delegation and auto-escalation, HR-validated cancellation, per-client entitlement templates, and a pilot rollout.
assumptions: French labour law is one country template among others
No payroll integration at this stage; calendar sync is one-way
summary.blind_spot: The audit trail should also cover changes to entitlement rule templates, and concurrent overlapping approvals must be race-safe.
